summary: The documentation build failed because `transformers/modeling_utils.py` contains an unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) at line 1974, causing a `SyntaxError` when the doc-builder tries to import the module while processing `llama.md`.
root_cause: An unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) was left in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` at line 1974, producing a Python SyntaxError that aborts the documentation build.

suggested_fix: Resolve the git merge conflict in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` at line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) and keeping the correct code, then commit the fix.
